actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO document_items (
    document_id,
    line_no,
    product_id,
    description,
    product_code,
    barcode,
    unit_id,
    tax_rate_id,
    warehouse_id,
    quantity,
    unit_price,
    net_unit_price,
    discount_percent,
    discount_amount,
    line_subtotal,
    tax_amount,
    line_total,
    line_status,
    note
)
VALUES (
    {{ this.params.invoiceId }},
    {{ this.params.lineNo }},
    {{ this.params.row.productId || null }},
    {{ this.params.row.description || "Item" }},
    {{ this.params.row.productCode || null }},
    {{ this.params.row.barcode || null }},
    {{ this.params.row.unitId || null }},
    {{ this.params.row.taxRateId || null }},
    {{ appsmith.store.warehouseId1 || 1 }},
    {{ this.params.row.quantity || 1 }},
    {{ this.params.row.unitPrice || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.unitPrice || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.discountPercent || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.discountAmount || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.lineSubtotal || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.taxAmount || 0 }},
    {{ this.params.row.lineTotal || 0 }},
    'CLOSED',
    {{ this.params.row.note || null }}
);
